component.name: Mantle Manager
component.summary: Mod manager for Bethesda games on Linux

description.p: Mantle Manager is a native Linux mod manager built for Bethesda's RPG catalogue — Skyrim (LE, SE, VR), Fallout (3, NV, 4), Oblivion, Morrowind, Starfield, and Enderal.

It provides a conflict-aware mod list, non-destructive VFS overlays (kernel overlayfs, fuse-overlayfs, or symlink-farm), per-profile INI management, and direct Nexus Mods integration with one-click downloads via the nxm:// handler.

ul.li: Drag-and-drop priority ordering with conflict detection
Profile system — separate mod lists, load orders, and INI settings per profile
VFS overlay — zero-copy mod staging, fully reversible
Nexus Mods download queue with nxm:// browser integration
Plugin system — Lua-style Rhai scripts and native .so extensions
Script Extender (SKSE, F4SE, …) detection and launch

screenshot.caption: Overview tab showing detected game and quick stats

description.p: First public alpha release of Mantle Manager.

ul.li: GTK4 + libadwaita UI with five-tab layout (Overview, Mods, Plugins, Downloads, Profiles)
Mod list with priority ordering and file-level conflict detection
Non-destructive VFS overlay using kernel overlayfs / fuse-overlayfs / symlink-farm
Profile CRUD with per-profile INI management
Plugin system with native .so and Rhai scripting support
Nexus Mods API integration — nxm:// handler and download queue
Script Extender detection (SKSE, F4SE) and auto-launch
ACF + PE version detection for installed games
